results.name: Earthquake in Venezuela
results.reason: On 24 Jun 2026 22:05 UTC a 7.5M earthquake, preceded by a strong foreshock, occurred in Venezuela. The impact on population is deemed high at this stage, with low visibility on the extent of the damage. Copernicus EMS Rapid Mapping is requested to provide damage assessment emergency mapping.
